rules: No Inter or generic sans for headings. Use Cabinet Grotesk for a bold, structural feel.
Overlines must be Uppercase, tiny, and wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Use JetBrains Mono for logs, code snippets, and raw email data.

layout.grid_structure: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout.metrics_focus: Top-left quadrant for main 'North Star' status/metrics.
layout.spacing: Generous internal padding in containers (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision. Use optical alignment.

components.strategy: Shadcn UI, highly customized. Flat solid surfaces, NO glassmorphism.
components.borders: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). 1px crisp borders. Container border-collapse.
components.shadows: None by default. Soft ambient shadow-sm on hover.
rules: Never use full-screen gradients. Texture over gloss.
Card components must be flat, rectangular, dense styles. Reduce border radius to rounded-sm or rounded-none.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='start-workflow-btn').
Hover states must explicitly set text color (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
Do NOT use HTML-based components for advanced interactions. Use Shadcn variants.
Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards.

company_logo.description: Minimalist black and white company logo.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'Cabinet Grotesk', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'JetBrains Mono' via Google Fonts/Fontshare.
Implement real-time status updates for the email processing workflow. If backend isn't ready, MUST implement a robust mocked interval flow.
Design the dashboard with a Sidebar for navigation and a main 'Control Room' grid for the email workflow.
Top cards should display metrics: Total Processed, Unread Queue, Errors.
Main view should be a split layout or use tabs: 'Processed Emails' (List) and 'AI Draft Preview' (Detail).
Ensure error logs are in a technical, monospace format (JetBrains Mono) with Signal Red (#E53935) indicators.
All components must be fully accessible. Check contrast, focus states, and aria labels.
Add 'data-testid' to EVERY button, link, and major UI component using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'workflow-toggle-button').
